purpose: ETF proxy universe used for market-regime and sector/thematic divergence analysis.
notes: This file now represents the retained ETF proxy set, not an N-PORT holdings-mapping target list.
Broad-market ETFs and macro/commodity/crypto proxy ETFs are retained for bar/context use.
Sector and independent industry/thematic ETFs are retained as regime/divergence proxies.
N-PORT holdings mapping has been removed from the active design to avoid implying constituent-level dependency in the mainline workflow.
